summary: Completed full backend API testing (12/12 passing) and frontend UI testing for all 5 pages. All core features working correctly.

issues: Shows 'Blocked in browser' instead of a proper toggle - notifications API not permitted in this context; this is expected in headless/preview but may be confusing for users
Profile picture shows 'Aligna User' placeholder text overlapping avatar - minor rendering issue with broken image fallback

action_items: Minor: Handle broken profile image gracefully in Settings (show initials or default avatar instead of broken image)
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 460 lines - acceptable for now but approaching the 700 line threshold
GoalUpdate uses model_dump() filtering None - but if user explicitly sets a field to None, update is skipped. Use model_dump(exclude_unset=True) instead.
Ritual session_type validation: no enum check - any string value accepted (e.g., 'foo' would pass with SESSION_COUNTS defaulting to 3)

success_rate.frontend: 95% - all pages load, minor design issues

seed_data_creation: Used existing test_session_screenshot_123 seed data. Test created and deleted goals during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All pages tested with cookie auth (set via JS evaluate before goto). Cookie: session_token=test_session_screenshot_123. All 5 nav tabs visible. Backend 100% passing. Minor: profile image broken fallback in Settings. session_type input validation in POST /api/rituals/entry accepts arbitrary strings.
